name: Onelogin Accounts Never Used After Provisioning
description: Detects active onelogin accounts older than 30 days with no successful login recorded.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.username AS account_name, u.created_at AS created_at FROM onelogin_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.status, 0) = 1 AND u.last_login IS NULL AND u.created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
remediation: Remove or disable unused accounts and confirm provisioning flows are not creating unnecessary access.
